definitions.usage_example: I live near the park.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I live near the park.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A corta distancia de; cercano a.]
definitions.usage_context_es: At a short distance from; close to.

definitions.usage_example: The hotel is close to the airport.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE close to AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The hotel is close to the airport.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A poca distancia de; cerca de.]
definitions.usage_context_es: At a short distance from; near.

definitions.usage_example: The hospital is far from here.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE far from AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The hospital is far from here.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A gran distancia de un lugar.]
definitions.usage_context_es: At a long distance from a place.

definitions.usage_example: The bank is next to the pharmacy.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE next to AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The bank is next to the pharmacy.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Posicionado inmediatamente al lado de algo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Positioned immediately to the side of something.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Al otro lado de / En frente de]
definitions.usage_example: The pharmacy is across from the bank.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE across from AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The pharmacy is across from the bank.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: En el lado opuesto de una calle, cuarto o área.]
definitions.usage_context_es: On the opposite side of a street, room, or area.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Frente a / Opuesto a]
definitions.usage_example: The restaurant is opposite the station.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The restaurant is opposite the station.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Frente a algo o al otro lado de algo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Facing or on the other side of something.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Delante de / En frente de]
definitions.usage_example: The car is in front of the house.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE in front of AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The car is in front of the house.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Posicionado directamente adelante o al frente de algo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Positioned directly ahead or at the front of something.

definitions.usage_example: The cat is behind the door.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The cat is behind the door.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: En la parte posterior de.]
definitions.usage_context_es: At the back of; in the rear of.

definitions.usage_example: I am between my two friends.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I am between my two friends.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: En el espacio que separa dos objetos, personas o puntos.]
definitions.usage_context_es: In the space separating two objects, people, or points.

definitions.usage_example: The cat is under the table.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The cat is under the table.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: En una posición más baja que (y a menudo cubierto por) algo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: In a position lower than (and often covered by) something.

definitions.usage_example: The lamp is above the table.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The lamp is above the table.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: En una posición más alta, pero no necesariamente tocando (compara con 'on').]
definitions.usage_context_es: In a higher position, but not necessarily directly touching (compare 'on').

definitions.usage_example: The temperature is below zero.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The temperature is below zero.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: En una posición más baja que algo (compara con 'under').]
definitions.usage_context_es: In a lower position than something (compare 'under').

definitions.usage_example: What is inside the box?
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: What is inside the box?]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: La parte interna o interior de algo; una versión más fuerte de 'in'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The inner part or interior of something; a stronger version of 'in'.

definitions.usage_example: Please wait outside the room.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Please wait outside the room.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: El lado externo o exterior de algo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The outer side or exterior of something.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A través de / Al otro lado de]
definitions.usage_example: She swam across the river.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: She swam across the river.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: De un lado a otro de algo (una superficie, línea o área).]
definitions.usage_context_es: From one side to the other of something (a surface, line, or area).

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A lo largo de]
definitions.usage_example: We walked along the beach.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: We walked along the beach.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Moviéndose en una dirección constante sobre un camino o línea (como una calle o río).]
definitions.usage_context_es: Moving in a constant direction on a path or line (like a road or river).

definitions.usage_example: The keys are in the box.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The keys are in the box.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para espacios cerrados (ciudades, países, cuartos, cajas).]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used for enclosed spaces (cities, countries, rooms, boxes).

definitions.usage_example: My birthday is in October.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: My birthday is in October.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para tiempo no específico (meses, años, estaciones).]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used for non-specific time (months, years, seasons).

definitions.usage_example: The book is on the table.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The book is on the table.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para superficies (mesas, pisos, paredes, calles).]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used for surfaces (tables, floors, walls, streets).

definitions.usage_example: The meeting is on Friday.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The meeting is on Friday.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para días y fechas específicos.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used for specific days and dates.

definitions.usage_example: I will meet you at the station.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I will meet you at the station.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para puntos o lugares específicos (la estación, la esquina, casa).]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used for specific points or locations (the station, the corner, home).

definitions.usage_example: The movie starts at 9 PM.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The movie starts at 9 PM.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para una hora específica del reloj.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used for a specific time on the clock.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Pasando / Más allá de (lugar)]
definitions.usage_example: Go past the church and turn left.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Go past the church and turn left.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Hacia o en el lado más lejano de algo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: To or on the further side of something.

definitions.usage_example: It is ten past three.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: It is ten past three.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para decir la hora, significando 'después de'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to tell time, meaning 'after'.

definitions.usage_example: Wash your hands before dinner.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Wash your hands before dinner.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Durante el período de tiempo que precede a un evento particular.]
definitions.usage_context_es: During the period of time preceding a particular event.

definitions.usage_example: Call me after the meeting.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Call me after the meeting.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Siguiendo en tiempo, lugar u orden.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Following in time, place, or order.

definitions.usage_example: I will wait until tomorrow.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I will wait until tomorrow.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Hasta un punto particular en el tiempo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Up to a particular point in time.

definitions.usage_example: He slept during the movie.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He slept during the movie.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para especificar un período de tiempo en el que algo sucede.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to specify a period of time in which something happens.
